reviews.title: THEY LOCKED OUR ROOM BEFORE WE EVEN CHECKED OUT!!!
reviews.text:
I expected a lot more after reading all the good reviews. But the experience was rather disappointing. 
The facilities are not quite meeting the standard for a 5-star hotel
There was no clear signs or instructions for parking. 
And WORST of all, on our last day, we went for breakfast and then came back to our room around 9AM but the keycard was locked and we could not get into our room. We spoke to the staff and they asked why we are still staying here without paying for extended stay, that's why our keycard was locked. But it was only 9AM and the checkout time is 12PM! We had to argue with them about checkout time and they came back saying there was an error with our key card. 
Paid for a so-called 5-star hotel, but very disappointing overall. We didn't feel respected at all.

reviews.title: A high class oasis in quiet northern town
reviews.text:
We stayed here for Christmas and to be far the hotel made our Lang son experience. Lang son is not a place where you find many western tourists but it a nice place to experience more of real Vietnam. 
This hotel is like any 5 star hotel, beautiful big clean modern rooms, amazing service and excellent facilities . The breakfasts were amazing. It has its own mall underneath with supermarket and modern eateries and cafes. It's quite a way from the busy areas of town however so a motorbikes is needed to get around for shopping and exploring. 
The staff are amazing. It's the only 5 star around with the nest best rating 3 so definitely the one to pick in the city.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Even high-end hotels offer reasonable prices.
reviews.text: Recently, the management of the VinPearl hotel has changed to the Sheraton brand. Therefore, when I said FourPoints to the taxi drivers, they didn't understand. I mentioned VinPearl instead. The facilities are still those from the VinPearl era, so they are comfortable. It is within walking distance to the night market, market, and a temple with limestone caves. During the hot daytime, using a taxi is also an option.

reviews.title: A Truly Outstanding Family Stay
reviews.text:
From the moment I arrived at Four Points by Sheraton Lang Son, I was impressed by the warm hospitality and exceptional service that made my stay unforgettable. The hotel itself is modern, elegant, and perfectly located to enjoy the breathtaking beauty of Lang Son city, but what truly sets this place apart is its incredible team.

At the front desk, Mr. Le Dinh Hoang and Ms. Thiet welcomed me with the utmost professionalism and genuine kindness. Their attentiveness, efficiency, and warm smiles immediately made me feel at home. Every request, big or small, was handled with care and thoughtfulness — they truly embody what world-class hospitality should be.

My dining experiences were equally delightful, thanks to Mr. Nguyen Phuong Nam and Ms. Nguyen Thu Trang at the restaurant. Their service was nothing short of impeccable — always attentive, courteous, and full of thoughtful gestures that made every meal feel special. Their recommendations were spot-on, and they ensured that every moment spent at the restaurant was enjoyable, relaxed, and full of beautiful flavors.

It is rare to find a team so dedicated, genuine, and passionate about delivering excellent service. Thanks to Mr. Hoang, Ms. Thiet, Mr. Nam, and Ms. Trang, my stay at Four Points by Sheraton Lang Son was not just comfortable, but truly heartwarming. I cannot wait to return and would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for an extraordinary experience in Lang Son.

Thank you again to the wonderful team for making my trip so memorable!

reviews.text:
I arrived from a long day of travelling and I was not feeling 100%, the next day I was not well as I must of picked up a stomach bug from travelling the day prior. When staff then management found out the predicament I was in they could not have done more for me, they where genuinely concerned for my welfare, they bought  soup and fruit to my room at no expense , inquiring at all times how I was feeling.
I could not of been in better hands, on recovery they organised a tour for me as well as transport back to Hanoi.
I can not recommend them and their hotel high enough.
Thank you all .
Rodney McKnight 
Australia

reviews.title: Fantastic hotel in lovely clean beautiful town
reviews.positives: We loved the architecture and design; our room was huge with both a shower and a tub, ambient lighting, bedside lamps, and view. Staff was gracious and helpful. We loved the huge sunlit pool, and the large well equipped fitness room. The breakfast buffet was great with a coffee machine to get whatever type of coffee we wanted. We ended up loving the town, despite finding no decent restaurants ( lots of coffee culture on display): wide clean boulevards, riverside paths and lots of greenery. There was even a mall attached where we found toiletries and groceries. All the kids wanted to speak English with us. We sat on the benches outside the hotel and watched the works go by! And we loved the western food at the restaurant!
reviews.negatives: Fitness center needed equipment sanitizer and towels, and hand sanitizer. People should be required to wear shoes and not be allowed to play their own loud music and obnoxious YouTube videos. Also the restaurant staff at dinner need to take away dirty plates and offer dessert. Breakfast staff took away dirty plates quickly. At dinner, We were left alone for a very long time after we finished our meal so we got up and left before finding out they had dessert to offer.

reviews.title: Great deal for 5-star facilities
reviews.text:
Lang Son is a very small city and this hotel is the first 5-star hotel in town. You might find this hotel is quite small but it’s reflect the town :)

We paid less than US$30 for a weekend night, thanks to Agoda insight deal. It’s really a great experience with nice room, nice view, good facilities and breakfast buffet. Since we checked in late, we didn’t have chance to use sauna and jacuzzi which are also included in the room rate.

If we must list out the cons, I might recommend Vinpearl to use better toiletries. The plastic bottom is suck, we couldn’t open it. 

We definitely come back this hotel and highly recommend to anyone to choose this hotel when you come to Lang Son.

reviews.title: Tolles Hotel, das Personal braucht noch etwas Anlauf
reviews.text: Definitiv eine top Adresse in Lang Son mit einem super Preis- Leistungsverhältnis. Die Zimmer sind großzügig und sehr sauber. Da das hotel erst im Oktober 2018 geöffnet hat, wirkten Möbel, Einrichtung oder Teppiche noch wie neu. Modernes Fitnesscenter, der wunderschönen Indoor-Pool und Sauna sind umsonst. Die das Personal ist sehr freundlich und bemüht, es den noch sehr wenigen Gästen recht zu machen. Allerdings gibt es noch viele Bereiche, in denen man mit Englisch nur verständnislose Blicke erntet. Da Lang Son keine typische Touristengegend ist und das Team sehr jung, denke ich aber, dass in einigen Monaten auch dieses Problem beseitigt ist. Definitiv ein sehr gutes hotel, welches ich nochmal für ein paar entspannte Tage aufsuchen werde.
